title: Assignment
description: Describes a work assignment dispatched to a specific agent, including the task context, stage, and execution constraints.

agent_id.description: Unique identifier of the agent receiving the assignment.

task_id.description: ID of the task being assigned.

stage.description: Lifecycle stage at which the agent is being assigned.

github_issue_number.description: GitHub issue number associated with this assignment.

assigned_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the assignment was dispatched.

timeout_minutes.description: Maximum number of minutes the agent has to complete the assignment before it is considered timed out.

context.description: Supplementary context provided to the agent to carry out the assignment.

spec_path.description: Relative path to the specification document for this task.

plan_path.description: Relative path to the implementation plan document.

branch_name.description: Git branch the agent should work on.

previous_reviews.description: Paths or identifiers of prior review reports relevant to this assignment.
